title: Coleac
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''coleac''' were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Sentience/Legends|non-sentient]], rodent-like creatures that were native to the grassy plains of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Ansion/Legends|Ansion]]. [[Suubatar]]s were their natural predators.<ref name="The Approaching Storm">[[The Approaching Storm]]</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[The Approaching Storm]]''
*[[The Approaching Storm (abridged audiobook)|''The Approaching Storm'' abridged audiobook]]
